title: Kex
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image=[[File:Kex-KOTOR2.jpg]] |name=Kex |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] **[[Mandalorians (Clan Ordo)|Followers of Canderous Ordo]] *[[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You still holding a grudge?''"
"''You still breathing?|[[Meetra Surik]] and Kex|''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''}} '''Kex''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior who worked as a [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]] of the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|Mandalorian camp]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Prior to joining the camp, he was found by [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] while working as muscle for [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. Though he sold and bought items to and from [[Meetra Surik]], he had an extreme dislike toward the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], partly because Surik was a Jedi and an outsider and partially because he had lost to Surik in the [[Battle Circle]]. He was part of Mandalore's strike force during the [[Battle of Telos IV]], where [[Darth Nihilus]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']] destroyed. ==Behind the scenes== As Kex challenged Surik, the player is allowed to choose the terms for engagement: either unarmed, swords, or use of their Force powers and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kex |es=Kex |pl=Kex }} [[Category:Humanoids]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Quartermasters]]
